title: Telematics Dashboard — Round 1
intro: This round reuses the sample prototype as a placeholder. Swap prototypeUrl in skyworks-telematics-r1.json to point at the real telematics prototype when it's ready.

tasks.title: Find a single machine's location
tasks.instruction: Locate a specific piece of equipment on the dashboard and confirm where it currently is.
focus: How quickly could you find one machine among many?
Is the OEM source of the data clear or does it matter to you?

tasks.title: Spot a machine that needs attention
tasks.instruction: Identify any equipment flagged as needing maintenance or showing a fault.
focus: Did the alert stand out enough?
Was it clear what action you'd take next?

tasks.title: Compare utilisation across the fleet
tasks.instruction: Try to get a sense of which machines are being used heavily and which are sitting idle.
focus: Could you answer 'what's underused?' without help?
What would make this more useful for rental decisions?
